prose:
Ethylene frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: built from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`; the DFT was a single point on this geometry, not re-optimized at DFT. SCF converged in 6 cycles.

HOMO = −7.6155818 eV, LUMO = −0.17986527 eV → **gap = 7.4357165 eV**.
No warnings reported.
